languages.text: {n}Услышав вас, старик, кажется, теряет всю волю к сопротивлению. Еще минуту назад готовый бороться, он без сил опускается на койку, и в его тело впиваются хирургические орудия. Несмотря на боль, человек больше не кричит — только пялится в потолок слезящимися глазами.{/n}

{n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Услышав вас, старик, кажется, теряет всю волю к сопротивлению. Еще минуту назад готовый бороться, он без сил опускается на койку, и в его тело впиваются хирургические орудия. Несмотря на боль, человек больше не кричит — только пялится в потолок слезящимися глазами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

{n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

{n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの話を聞いた老人、抵抗する気力を失った。さっきは戦おうとしていたが、今はベッドにへたり、手術器具が体内に突き刺される。痛みは感じるが、もう叫ばない。天井を見つめる、涙を浮かべた眼。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: あなたの話を聞いた老人、抵抗する気力を失った。さっきは戦おうとしていたが、今はベッドにへたり、手術器具が体内に突き刺される。痛みは感じるが、もう叫ばない。天井を見つめる、涙を浮かべた眼。

languages.text: {n}Seni duyan yaşlı adam, tüm direnme isteğini kaybetmiş gibi görünüyor. Az evvel savaşmaya hazırken şimdi yatağa yığılıyor ve cerrahi aletler vücuduna saplanıyor. Acıya rağmen artık çığlık atmıyor, sadece parlayan gözlerle tavana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seni duyan yaşlı adam, tüm direnme isteğini kaybetmiş gibi görünüyor. Az evvel savaşmaya hazırken şimdi yatağa yığılıyor ve cerrahi aletler vücuduna saplanıyor. Acıya rağmen artık çığlık atmıyor, sadece parlayan gözlerle tavana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Al oír tus palabras, el anciano parece perder toda voluntad de resistirse. Hace un segundo estaba listo para luchar, pero ahora se deja caer sobre la cama sin fuerzas mientras introducen el instrumental quirúrgico en su cuerpo. A pesar del dolor, el hombre ya no grita: solo mira al techo con ojos relucientes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al oír tus palabras, el anciano parece perder toda voluntad de resistirse. Hace un segundo estaba listo para luchar, pero ahora se deja caer sobre la cama sin fuerzas mientras introducen el instrumental quirúrgico en su cuerpo. A pesar del dolor, el hombre ya no grita: solo mira al techo con ojos relucientes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}听到你的话，老人似乎失去了所有抵抗的意志。片刻前他还斗志昂扬，但现在却毫无生气地瘫在床上，任由手术器械刺入身体。不管有多痛苦，他也不再尖叫，只是眼含泪光地盯着天花板。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}听到你的话，老人似乎失去了所有抵抗的意志。片刻前他还斗志昂扬，但现在却毫无生气地瘫在床上，任由手术器械刺入身体。不管有多痛苦，他也不再尖叫，只是眼含泪光地盯着天花板。{/n}

languages.text: {n}En vous entendant annoncer votre décision, le vieil homme semble perdre toute sa combativité. Il cesse de résister et s'affale mollement sur le lit, laissant les instruments chirurgicaux pénétrer dans son corps. Malgré la douleur, le patient se contente de fixer le plafond de ses yeux humides sans pousser le moindre cri.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En vous entendant annoncer votre décision, le vieil homme semble perdre toute sa combativité. Il cesse de résister et s'affale mollement sur le lit, laissant les instruments chirurgicaux pénétrer dans son corps. Malgré la douleur, le patient se contente de fixer le plafond de ses yeux humides sans pousser le moindre cri.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als er dich hört, scheint der alte Mann jeden Willen zum Widerstand zu verlieren. Gerade eben war er noch voller Kampfgeist, doch nun bricht er teilnahmslos auf dem Bett zusammen, und die chirurgischen Instrumente werden in seinen Körper gestoßen. Trotz der Schmerzen schreit der Mann nicht mehr, sondern starrt mit feuchten Augen zur Decke.{/n}
